zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Symonds於1420年出生在英國藍卡爾卡芙特 煙雨 素沃斯時，他的父親John Symonds30歲，母親Lording26歲。他於大約1437年與Catherine Ann Congrave在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯特拉頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1473年在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯特拉頓享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Symonds于1420年出生在英国藍卡爾卡芙特 煙雨 素沃斯时，他的父亲John Symonds30岁，母亲Lording26岁。他于大约1437年与Catherine Ann Congrave在英国英格兰多瑟特斯特拉頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1473年在英国英格兰多瑟特斯特拉頓享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Symonds

meanings: English: variant of Simmons , with excrescent -d.

variants.name: Simmons
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Simon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Symonds was born in 1420, in Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, England, his father, John Symonds, was 30 and his mother, Lording, was 26. He married Catherine Ann Congrave about 1437, in Stratton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1473, in Stratton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Symonds est né en 1420, à Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Symonds, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lording, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Ann Congrave environ 1437, à Stratton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1473, à Stratton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Symonds 1420 in Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Symonds 30 und seine Mutter Lording 26. Er hat um 1437 in Stratton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Catherine Ann Congrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1473 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Stratton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Symonds è nato il nel 1420 nel Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John Symonds, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lording, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Ann Congrave circa 1437, nel Stratton, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1473, nel Stratton, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Symondsが1420年にイギリスランカシュアイアクロフト ウィス ソウスウオルスで生まれた時，父John Symondsは30歳，母Lordingは26歳であった。約1437年にイギリスイギリスドールセトストラットオンでCatherine Ann Congraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1473年にイギリスイギリスドールセトストラットオンで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Symonds(이)가 1420년 영국 랭카실르 크로프트 위스 소우스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Symonds(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lording(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스트래턴에서 Catherine Ann Congrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1473년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스트래턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Symonds nasceu em 1420, em Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Symonds, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lording, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Ann Congrave aproximadamente 1437, em Stratton, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1473, em Stratton, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Symonds родился в 1420 г. в местности крофт вит соутворт, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Symonds было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lording, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Ann Congrave около 1437 г. в местности страттон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1473 г. в местности страттон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Symonds nació en 1420, en Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Symonds, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lording, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Catherine Ann Congrave aproximadamente 1437, en Stratton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1473, en Stratton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
